checks.msg: PASS: door_distinct_points — scanned qualifying locations with non-NULL positive bounds; no two door rows of any location share the same (x, y); a forced duplicate surfaces by name and heals via delete + re-materialize; two doors sitting at the exact bounds center are re-derived onto distinct perimeter points by materialize_doors (G1, TICKET-0040)
PASS: placement_unit — all 19 derive_positions/distance/door_placeholder_point perimeter cases hold

PASS: door_coverage — every active connects_to edge between active locations carries both directed door rows; an archived endpoint is excluded; a broken direction surfaces by name and heals via materialize_doors; an empty world reaches an explicit 'no edges to verify' pass
PASS: door_terminal — door.id carries no FK, spatial_doors.py implements no math
PASS: no canon write outside a sanctioned site

PASS: location_type_classified — every active location's type is catalogued with a non-NULL interior/exterior classification; an archived location's uncatalogued type never surfaces; missing, NULL, and out-of-vocab classifications all FAIL by name
PASS: function_length — every function over 80 lines is baselined at or below its recorded length
PASS: module_budget — every module over 40 functions or 1000 lines is baselined at or below its recorded values
